package.name: stereo_depth
package.description: Stereo vision based depth/distance measurement for ROS2 Jazzy. Subscribes to two image streams (/camera0/image_raw, /camera1/image_raw) and their CameraInfo topics. Performs uncalibrated stereo rectification (SIFT + RANSAC), computes a disparity map with StereoSGBM, and lets the user select a rectangular (left-click drag) or circular (right-click drag) region with the mouse; the median depth (in mm and m) inside that region is displayed on the image.
